dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal specifies SMA1 and SMA2 without concrete periods. Used sma_10 (faster) and sma_20 (slower) as standard trend-following pair. Original source code was incomplete/corrupted. Stop-loss threshold was marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source, defaulted to 2.0% as reasonable risk parameter for trend-following strategy. Entry condition 'Current position in [0, -1]' is enforced by backtest engine position management, not included as explicit condition.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal specifies SMA1 and SMA2 without concrete periods. Used sma_10 (faster) and sma_20 (slower) as standard trend-following pair. Original source code was incomplete/corrupted. Stop-loss threshold was marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source, defaulted to 2.0% as reasonable risk parameter for trend-following strategy. Entry condition 'Current position in [0, -1]' is enforced by backtest engine position management, not included as explicit condition.

source_rule_text: Enter a long position when the faster moving average crosses above the slower moving average, signaling an uptrend initiation.
